company.name: Techlution AI
company.tagline: AI-powered IT solutions that make work faster, smarter, and more efficient.
company.description: Techlution AI builds intelligent systems using AI, automation, and scalable technologies to help businesses optimize operations and grow.

services.title: AI & Machine Learning
services.content: Custom ML models, LLM development, AI agents, RAG systems, and prompt engineering tailored for business automation and intelligence.

services.title: Computer Vision
services.content: OCR, object detection, facial recognition, and medical imaging solutions using advanced AI models.

services.title: Automation & Integration
services.content: n8n workflows, API integrations, webhooks, and real-time system automation to reduce manual work.

services.title: Healthcare AI Solutions
services.content: EHR, PMS, RCM automation, medical billing, coding, denial management, and HIPAA-compliant systems.

services.title: DevOps & Cloud
services.content: Azure, Docker, Terraform, CI/CD pipelines, scalable deployments, and infrastructure automation.

services.title: Data Pipelines
services.content: Web scraping, ETL pipelines, structured data extraction, and processing systems.

projects.name: Hospital Management System
projects.details: Complete system for patient records, scheduling, billing, and reporting.

projects.name: RCM Automation
projects.details: Automated revenue cycle management including billing, claim submission, and payment tracking.

projects.name: EHR / PMS / EDI Systems
projects.details: Healthcare systems including patient records, practice management, and 837P EDI integrations.

projects.name: Medical Coding & Denial Management
projects.details: AI-assisted coding and denial handling systems to improve claim approval rates.

projects.name: Voice AI Agents
projects.details: AI calling agents for appointment scheduling, rescheduling, cancellations, and prescription refills.

projects.name: Customer Support AI
projects.details: AI chatbots and voice agents for businesses like restaurants, offices, and hotels.
